projectDescription: WebGoat is a deliberately insecure web application maintained by OWASP that teaches web application security through interactive hands-on lessons covering the OWASP Top 10 and beyond.
keyFeatures: 30+ interactive security vulnerability lessons mapped to OWASP Top 10
User accounts with per-user lesson progress tracking
WebWolf companion tool for simulating attacker-controlled server
Docker and standalone JAR deployment options
Hints system and automated assignment grading
Customizable lesson menu via environment variables
Support for SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF, JWT, Path Traversal, XXE, SSRF, and more
Integration tests for all lessons ensuring correctness
publicApiSurface: AssignmentEndpoint interface — Base for creating lesson assignments
Lesson abstract class — Base for creating new lessons
Category enum — Lesson categories (A1-A10, CLIENT_SIDE, CHALLENGE, etc.)
